theme: gramophone needle gliding across a custom-pressed record
title: Custom Pressing for a Look-Ahead Pickup Arm
strategies: trivial: press cells onto grooves in raw cell-id order, packed to the capacity of each groove (checker baseline)
greedy: sort cells by how often the cue sheet plays them and press the hottest cells onto the centre grooves, coldest at the rim -- ignores which cells are ever CUED NEAR EACH OTHER

strong: build a co-occurrence graph from pairs of cue-sheet entries within w of each other (the arm's only reachable reorderings), cluster it under the groove-capacity budget, then chain the clusters into a groove order by inter-cluster affinity -- designs the pressing so the FIXED look-ahead rule itself sweeps each cluster's grooves in order

headroom above strong: refine the within-cluster groove order (not just cluster order) from the same co-occurrence weights, and reconcile cases where the mandatory-coverage visit and the hot extra visits disagree on cluster boundaries
